properties.displayName: Enforce no MySQL Single Server has Firewall rule 0.0.0.0 - 255.255.255.255
properties.description: Blocking the firewall rule 0.0.0.0 - 255.255.255.255 will help mitigate unauthorized access from the internet.
nonComplianceMessages: MySQL database Single server does not meet AA SCCF Benchmark control: MySQL Single server should not have a firewall rule of 0.0.0.0 - 255.255.255.255. If you would like to seek an exception for this policy, please reference this guide. https://developer.aa.com/docs/default/component/gaas-policy_as_code
